title: Grok 5 — The Biggest AI News Is Here (Musk’s AGI Bet)
summary: A YouTube video reviews claims about Grok 5, xAI's upcoming model, grading various rumors by credibility and discussing the Colossus 2 training infrastructure. The video examines whether Musk's "indistinguishable from AGI" claim holds up and compares Grok 5 against competitors like Claude and GPT-5.
